category_sources: SourceForge project page lists Liberal Crime Squad under Turn Based Strategy and Role-Playing Games.
source_facts.description says it is a satirical console-based political role-playing/strategy game.
display_name_sources: SourceForge official project page title is Liberal Crime Squad.
source_facts.homepage points to the lcsgame SourceForge project.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page is the best available official documentation/homepage surface in the supplied and reviewed sources.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive is the official SourceForge SVN trunk URL.
tags_sources: SourceForge project page lists turn-based strategy and RPG categories.
